you may have to pull some keys out from your keyboard unlike other rhythm games, though.

I feel like rythm games are the most replayable type of games.
Although it has some minor bugs I'd still say it's a fun game to pass time with.
been playing it for a good while and it is one of my favourite games next to gd especially once you get introdouced to pseudos

Absolutely amazing game. i genuinely think this game is the best music game in the world, better then gd in opinion, even tho you can do lot more stuff on gd, playing this just feels so much better. this is easily in my top 3 games ever, im not even glazing by now i have 150 hours on this game and still am very excited to learn, and improve more and more.the dlc literaly has characters and LORE in a rythm game. OF COURSE these guys also created rythm doctor.. PLEASE if you have the money, try this game out, i promise it is SO GOOD

Please bring this game on PS5 i'm begging.

A fun game to play when you're bored, also very funny when playing with other people.

Outstanding rythmic game! An absolute blast and challenging. :D Never ending fun

really fun game its a ryhthym game so you wanna click on the beats

the past few updates to fix optimization have had the opposite effect on my system. i know 7s are hard at work trying to fix it but it was never like this. if you have a lower end device, don't install the game right now.
great game with a steep difficulty curve

Absolutely excellent game! 
The gameplay is really simple, its a one (or two) button game.
It starts off very easy, and each new rhythm is introduced one by one.
The game offers a good challenge, if you want to get all trophies! Challenging but far from unachievable. 
Genuinely one of the best rhythm games ever made
this game is the equivalent of telling a toddler to trace a lollipop with their eyes whilst violently shaking their head left and right

This is my favourite Rhythm/Music game. Actually, one of my favourite games in general! 

I've played FNF, JSAB, Guitar Hero, Geometry Dash, but the sheer simplicity of ADOFAI's 1 to 2 button controls always pulls me back. I love the official levels, as well as the various user-created levels on the Workshop. The level editor has a lot of options, but I don't find myself overwhelmed by the options. There's levels of vastly different difficulties, so there should be something for everyone. The only way to loose your checkpoint is to leave or reset the level, theres no death system that takes you to the beginning if you fail too often. 

I also have to recommend Neo Cosmos, as it adds new features that some custom levels require (Holds, Triple Planets, Free Roam, all that). The official DLC levels are also quite fun to play. "Nope, No Hints Here" comes to mind, a level full of multiple mini-games.

Beautifully made. Such a simple concept, but so well done.
The little hints towards calibration and general accessibility settings are subtle but essential.
I love games that you can show someone for 5 seconds and they understand the whole game, but then there are continually escalating levels of mastery. Games like this are primal

The pitch seems unbelievable: How much gameplay depth can there really be in a single button game?
But it's the combination of having your eyes and ears working together to keep you on track that makes the game shine. A perfect fusion of gorgeous visuals and rocking tunes.
Fun and difficult rhythm game like geometry dash, if you look at my hours on GD, you will be surprised :)
a very fun way to think of music, fun game to play, fun levels. a bit glitchy in some spots but bugs get fixed every ouple months
Very fun just don't download mods, because it starts to make your game buggy

so I guess for like sub $10 it's a pretty good game with a unique and fun concept.

however the moment you beat the 12 levels built into the game and start to venture into customs, it turns into something that literally nothing can prepare you for. There's blocks used in their charts that aren't even in the original levels, there's none of the precursor levels before the main one to show you the timing on the shapes that are mapped, and as a player just wanting to play more of the game I bought this is massively frustrating. Feels like I need to learn an entire new set of mechanics just to enjoy custom levels instead of the mappers being resourceful with the base mechanics introduced in the original base songs.

EDIT: Too the one dude who commented that base game is all I should be reviewing, level editor is literally a tag for the ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ game. Custom levels are built into this from the start and it's considered part of the game, I just mentioned the levels that aren't custom for sake of providing an example.
worth every dollar. this is the best rhythm game that i have in my collection. props to 7th beat!
Similar to geometry dash but makes me rage way faster. 30 attempts in this game makes me crash out but 15k in geometry dash makes me slightly below neutral. very fast paced but fun! Would recommend.

game is fun and all, but it has this one issue that pisses me off: it will sometimes not register your input on a single button, like you spam a button 2 times fast and it'll just not register. shouldn't be a problem to most people cus you do wanna use 2 buttons at least, but my coordination between my hands is ass and i feel like i could do it with one IF THE GAME WOULD ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ REGISTER MY INPUTS.

also the way i know they aren't being registered is cus no X's appear even tho i pressed.
This game is excellent but could use a few more checkpoints.
i play so many rhythm games, but this game is like WOW, complete a map with perfect accuracy feel soo rewarding and addictive, i would highly recommend this game to every rhythm game enjoyers. :)
Very addicting game at the start, fun to play if there's nothing much to do. A lot of custom levels. Very entertaining game in general!
Amazing graphics, medium skill reqiured, many achievments, hard achievments, multiple versions, cool levels, amazing player made levels, maybe better than geometry dash.
it is an amazing game with endless possibilities from the custom levels. I recomend playing it
i personally love this game super interactive! the only downside i guess would be the fact that it does'nt tell you how to start off, tho i might just be a dumbass lol.

As someone who played this rhythm game for 200+ hours (mobile and pc combined) PLEASE play the extra and featured levels. They are really good levels and I recommend the featured levels to people who don't want the levels with the more advanced stuff. If you have money and like rhythm games then I totally recommend this one

the fact you need to do the speed trials to get B-X is annoying since it's just do the thing but faster, there's basically no creativity and is un-fun, rest of the game is fun though but trying to unlock B-X was just really painful which is why I instead hacked my save because that ended up being funner, practicing B-X was funner than practicing the speed trials, by a lot.
Also the fact that if I exit a level after passing a check point and play another if I want to go back to playing the other level I need to start at the VERY BEGINNING  AND PLAY THROUGH PARTS I ALREADY BEAT AND THAT ANNOYS ME SO MUCH I WANT TO THROW MY MECHANICAL KEYBOARD STRAIT THROUGH MY MONITOR. this is especially annoying on levels that are hard and have a lot of checkpoints (that get used a lot), for me this would be 11-X Heracles

We are gathered here today, to discuss an important matter.
this game is good
Absolutely amazing. So easy to pick up but insane to master. All about pattern recognition and complex rhythms. If you're into rhythm games at ALL this is a MUST TRY!
This game is so consistent with its inputs, if you think its hard you're playing songs out of your league or its just a SKILL ISSUE. Def buy if you love rhythm games.
really fun game! really improved my rhythm skills! was worth spending money!

This game made my computer short-circuit. Once my computer was fixed, it crashed for some reason. Once my computer is fixed, the audio is glitchy for some reason and I'm too scared to continue playing. ADOFAI is HAUNTED bro. It's a really fun game though.
It's pretty hard to learn at first but once you gain a better understanding of its mechanics and certain unique patters it becomes very fun.
Awesome rhythm game. Fun and intuitive. Works with a controller too.
You can mod it and smash your keyboard to pieces trying to play Rush E with all 10 fingers at once. Would recommend
I really love this game, the DLC was really fun to play, But i hate the T4-EX so much. Game was so runing VERY GOOD
Simple yet intuitive. Easy to understand but hard to master. This type of game design is so nice to see.

The music in this game is fantastic and the mechanics are easy to learn. I haven't put much time into it as it is my game I play in between doing things on my steam deck. I really wish that the author could have posted more of the music on spotify or something so that I could listen to the songs in the car.
I wanted to kms so badly after spending over 2 hrs and 150 atempts on level 10 of this game , but overall its great
This game is so inconsistent with the input, don't waste your money on this, play something with better inputs
Uhh it is actually really fun! Finishes the trifactor: osu,  geometry dash, and now ADOFAI!
